creator: todd@1ccs.com
text:
There was a bug report and fix for the 5.x kernel. but nothing has been done
with the 6.x kernel.

See:  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=50310
for the 5.x bug/fix.

As the libalias module has completely changed in the 6.x kernel the 5.x
workaround no longer applies.

How-To-Repeat: Enable natd on the firewall/router. Have a client connect to IRC. Download a
piece of a file. Now try to download the rest of the file with a RESUME.
